UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOSKINS, BRITTANY DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1834 SUNNYDALE AVE., CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT******ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HOSKINS, BRITTANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
